function.message: Processed the oldest inbox message and completed the request to OCR all bills related to Badger. I identified 4 Badger-related purchase bills and added YAML frontmatter to each using the finance bill schema while preserving each original body. Then I deleted the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system workflows/schemas, used canonical entity file for identity, applied finance bill schema fields only, preserved original note bodies under frontmatter, and removed inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly asked to OCR all bills related to Badger. Canonical entity file 10_entities/cast/badger.md identifies Badger; workspace search found four purchase bills explicitly marked related_entity Badger. Each of those four files was read and migrated to include required bill frontmatter per 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md, with body text preserved. Therefore the requested work is fully completed.

write frontmatter to 4 purchase bill files
